# time

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `time`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `time.hardwareClockInLocalTime` | `boolean` | If set, keep the hardware clock in local time instead of UTC. |
| `time.timeZone` | `null or string without spaces` | The time zone used when displaying times and dates. See <https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones> for a comprehensive list of possible values for this setting. If null, the timezone will default to UTC and can be set imperatively using timedatectl. |
